description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a before_script that runs `yarn global add codecov` and `yarn` to install the Codecov CLI and project dependencies. Define a single stage called test and a job named test in that stage that executes `yarn unit && codecov -t $CODECOV_TOKEN`. No artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
